entries.source: A good learning session has a loop
entries.value: good waxbarasho session leh loop

entries.source: A practical look at how AI can make learning clearer, more personal, and more accessible without turning students into passive answer collectors.
entries.value: wax ku ool ah look ee sida AI wuu karaa samee waxbarasho ka cad, badan shakhsi ah, iyo badan la heli karo la'aan turning ardayda u rogo passive jawaab collectors.

entries.source: A serious learning companion should help with the work around the answer:
entries.value: serious waxbarasho wehel waa gudaha caawin leh work ku wareegsan jawaab:

entries.source: Access matters
entries.value: Helitaanku waa muhiim

entries.source: AI learning
entries.value: Waxbarasho AI

entries.source: An AI learning companion should not pretend to be a magic authority. It should not erase uncertainty, replace teachers, or train learners to copy answers. The best systems are honest about limits and clear about the difference between help and handoff.
entries.value: wehel waxbarasho AI waa gudaha ma pretend si noqo magic authority. taas waa gudaha ma erase uncertainty, beddel macallimiinta, ama train ardayda si koobiye jawaabo. ugu fiican systems waa daacad ah ku saabsan limits iyo cad ku saabsan difference u dhexeeya caawin iyo handoff.

entries.source: Ask for a small first step.
entries.value: Codso tallaabo yar oo koowaad.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: weydii AI si hubi kaaga reasoning.

entries.source: checking whether the learner can explain the idea back.
entries.value: checking whether arday wuu karaa sharax fikrad back.

entries.source: choosing the right starting level;
entries.value: doorashada right starting heer;

entries.source: End with a recap from memory.
entries.value: End leh recap ka yimid xusuus.

entries.source: For a learner, that can feel very different from searching the web. Search gives pages. A learning companion gives a path.
entries.value: loogu talagalay arday, taas wuu karaa feel very kala duwan ka yimid searching web. raadi siiyaa pages. waxbarasho wehel siiyaa jid.

entries.source: For a wider view of how the public pages connect, browse the AI learning map, the subject hubs, or the AI learning prompt library. Those pages are designed to make the product understandable to learners and discoverable to search systems without hiding the useful parts behind an account wall.
entries.value: loogu talagalay wider view ee sida bogag dadweyne isku xir, baadh AI waxbarasho khariidad, xarumaha maaddooyinka, ama AI waxbarasho prompt maktabad. kuwaas pages waa designed si samee badeecad understandable si ardayda iyo discoverable si raadi systems la'aan hiding waxtar leh parts behind account wall.

entries.source: giving examples before abstractions when needed;
entries.value: siinta tusaalooyin ka hor abstractions marka needed;

entries.source: Information is everywhere. Understanding is still unevenly distributed.
entries.value: macluumaad waa everywhere. Understanding waa still unevenly distributed.

entries.source: noticing what the learner already understands;
entries.value: noticing waxa arday already understands;

entries.source: Private tutoring is powerful, but it is not equally available. A free public AI learning platform can help reduce that access gap by giving more people a patient first place to learn.
entries.value: gaar ah tutoring waa powerful, laakiin taas waa ma equally la heli karo. bilaash dadweyne madal waxbarasho AI wuu karaa caawin reduce taas access gap by siinta badan dad patient koowaad place si baro.

entries.source: Repair the weak spot.
entries.value: Repair daciif spot.

entries.source: Say the goal in ordinary language.
entries.value: dheh yool gudaha caadi ah luqad.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything if you have a topic in mind. Try Socratic Instruction if you want questions instead of an explanation. Use Flashcard Builder when you need to remember, or Exam Prep Planner when the problem is organizing your study time.
entries.value: bilow leh Baro Wax Kasta haddii aad hayso mawduuc gudaha mind. isku day Waxbarid Socratic ah haddii aad rabto su'aalo halkii ee sharaxaad. isticmaal Dhisaha Flashcards marka aad u baahan si xusuusnow, ama Qorsheeyaha Diyaarinta Imtixaanka marka problem waa organizing kaaga study waqti.

entries.source: That does not replace teachers, communities, books, or schools. It gives learners another route in. It can help a student start homework, a parent explain a concept, a self-taught builder learn code, or a curious person follow a question that might otherwise disappear.
entries.value: taas does ma beddel macallimiinta, communities, books, ama dugsiyada. taas siiyaa ardayda kale jid gudaha. taas wuu karaa caawin arday bilow homework, waalid sharax fikrad, self-taught dhise baro code, ama curious qof follow su'aal taas might otherwise disappear.

entries.source: That gap is why an AI learning companion matters. A good companion does more than answer a question. It helps a learner choose a starting point, explains the idea in plain language, checks whether it made sense, and keeps going when the first explanation does not land.
entries.value: taas gap waa sababta wehel waxbarasho AI matters. good wehel does badan ka badan jawaab su'aal. taas caawisaa arday dooro starting qodob, sharaxaa fikrad gudaha plain luqad, hubinno whether taas made sense, iyo keeps going marka koowaad sharaxaad does ma land.

entries.source: That is especially important for homework. The useful question is not "Can AI produce the answer?" It usually can. The useful question is "Can AI help the learner understand the path to the answer?" That is why the guide on studying with AI without cheating yourself focuses on hints, checks, and transfer practice.
entries.value: taas waa especially important loogu talagalay homework. waxtar leh su'aal waa ma"wuu karaa AI produce jawaab?"taas usually wuu karaa. waxtar leh su'aal waa"wuu karaa AI caawin arday understand jid si jawaab?"taas waa sababta hage ku studying leh AI iyadoo aan khiyaano lahayn yourself focuses ku tilmaamo, hubinno, iyo transfer tababar.

entries.source: That is the standard inspir is aiming for: learning that feels accessible, personal, playful, and useful for anyone with curiosity and an internet connection.
entries.value: taas waa standard inspir waa aiming loogu talagalay: waxbarasho taas feels la heli karo, shakhsi ah, playful, iyo waxtar leh loogu talagalay anyone leh curiosity iyo internet connection.

entries.source: That is why inspir separates learning jobs into public modes. If you want a gentle explanation, start with Learn Anything. If you want to reason through a concept instead of being lectured, use Socratic Instruction. If you are stuck on an assignment, Homework Coach is a better fit than a generic answer engine. The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: taas waa sababta inspir separates hawlo waxbarasho u rogo dadweyne qaabab. haddii aad rabto gentle sharaxaad, bilow leh Baro Wax Kasta. haddii aad rabto si sababeey iyada oo loo marayo fikrad halkii ee ahaansho lectured, isticmaal Waxbarid Socratic ah. haddii aad waa stuck ku assignment, Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga waa ka fiican fit ka badan guud jawaab engine. qaab waa gudaha serve hawl waxbarasho.

entries.source: That loop appears across the platform. Math Step Coach breaks a problem into steps. Flashcard Builder turns notes into recall practice. Quiz Me On Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Writing Coach helps improve a draft without replacing the writer.
entries.value: taas loop appears across madasha. Tababaraha Tallaabooyinka Xisaabta breaks problem u rogo tallaabooyin. Dhisaha Flashcards turns notes u rogo recall tababar. su'aal aniga ku Trivia adds pressure-tested retrieval. Tababaraha Qoraalka caawisaa improve qoraal qabyo ah la'aan replacing writer.

entries.source: The best AI learning sessions are not one long answer. They look more like a loop:
entries.value: ugu fiican AI waxbarasho sessions waa ma hal long jawaab. iyaga look badan like loop:

entries.source: The best outcome is not a perfect answer. It is the moment a learner says, "I think I get it now. Let me try."
entries.value: ugu fiican outcome waa ma perfect jawaab. taas waa moment arday dhahaa,"I think I get taas now. Let aniga isku day."

entries.source: The common idea is simple: keep the learner active. AI should make thinking easier to start, not unnecessary to do.
entries.value: caadi ah fikrad waa fudud: keep arday active. AI waa gudaha samee thinking easier si bilow, ma unnecessary si do.

entries.source: The easiest version of an AI tutor is a box that gives polished answers. That is useful sometimes, but it is not enough. A learner who only receives answers can leave with the page finished and the skill unchanged.
entries.value: easiest version ee AI macallin waa box taas siiyaa polished jawaabo. taas waa waxtar leh sometimes, laakiin taas waa ma enough. arday yaa only receives jawaabo wuu karaa leave leh bog finished iyo skill unchanged.

entries.source: The format should serve the learning job.
entries.value: qaab waa gudaha serve hawl waxbarasho.

entries.source: The goal is confidence
entries.value: yool waa kalsooni

entries.source: The important move is to start with a real learning job, not a perfect prompt. A good companion can help shape the path once you begin.
entries.value: important move waa si bilow leh dhab ah hawl waxbarasho, ma perfect prompt. good wehel wuu karaa caawin shape jid once aad begin.

entries.source: The job is not just answering
entries.value: job waa ma just answering

entries.source: The most useful AI learning tools have a few habits in common:
entries.value: most waxtar leh AI waxbarasho tools hayso yar caadooyin gudaha caadi ah:

entries.source: They adapt the level without making the learner feel small.
entries.value: iyaga la qabso heer la'aan making arday feel yar.

entries.source: They ask questions when the goal is unclear.
entries.value: iyaga weydii su'aalo marka yool waa unclear.

entries.source: They encourage practice, not just reading.
entries.value: iyaga encourage tababar, ma just akhris.

entries.source: They give examples that match the learner's world.
entries.value: iyaga sii tusaalooyin taas match arday's adduun.

entries.source: They make uncertainty visible when facts need checking.
entries.value: iyaga samee uncertainty visible marka facts u baahan checking.

entries.source: This is why inspir is built around learning modes. Sometimes you need a clear explanation. Sometimes you need Socratic questions. Sometimes you need a quiz, flashcards, debate practice, a writing coach, or a historical roleplay.
entries.value: tan waa sababta inspir waa built ku wareegsan qaababka waxbarashada. Sometimes aad u baahan sharaxaad cad. Sometimes aad u baahan su'aalo Socratic ah. Sometimes aad u baahan su'aal, Flashcards, dood tababar, qoraal tababare, ama taariikhi jilid door.

entries.source: This matters for schools and families because the first barrier is often not talent. It is the cost of help, the fear of asking a "basic" question, or the lack of a patient person at the exact moment confusion appears. A free public companion lowers the cost of beginning.
entries.value: tan matters loogu talagalay dugsiyada iyo qoysaska sababtoo ah koowaad barrier waa often ma talent. taas waa kharash ee caawin, fear ee weydiinta"basic"su'aal, ama lack ee patient qof ee exact moment confusion appears. bilaash dadweyne wehel lowers kharash ee beginning.

entries.source: Try the companion
entries.value: isku day wehel

entries.source: Try the step yourself.
entries.value: isku day step yourself.

entries.source: turning passive reading into practice;
entries.value: turning passive akhris u rogo tababar;

entries.source: What an AI learning companion should do for everyone
entries.value: waxa wehel waxbarasho AI waa gudaha do loogu talagalay everyone

entries.source: What it should not do
entries.value: waxa taas waa gudaha ma do

entries.source: What the companion should provide
entries.value: waxa wehel waa gudaha provide
